avoidSaying: help me improve my working efficiency
realLifeExamples: AI helps me work more efficiently.
This review system helps me work more efficiently and make fewer mistakes.
usageNotes: 表达效率提升时，直接用 work more efficiently 很自然；比 working efficiency 更口语、更常用。
productionPrompts: 用 AI helps me ... 造一句和学习或工作效率有关的英文句子。
